Module 1: 	Crazy Like a Fox
!
Executive Summary
When I first got started online I had zero experience, maybe you’re the
same too. I began in the stock market niche, but I wasn’t a stockbroker or
investment advisor, I just had some interest in the industry.
At first I started a basic newsletter and began publishing, but had no idea
what I was doing. My first email was sent to 17 people - mostly friends and
family.
One day, a friend of mine who was also in the stock market newsletter
business asked me, “Why are you publishing this newsletter for free?
You’re crazy like a fox for doing this!”
When I got started, I knew I wanted to start a business and sell information
products, but I didn’t know how or where to start. This “crazy like a fox”
comment gave me the clues to begin building a more serious business.
“The battle is always won before you set foot on the battlefield”
- Sun Tzu
This Sun Tzu quote is the key to PLF - it’s all about putting honest work in
now and winning the “battle before the battle.”
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 1 of 3 --

How do you put in the work? Build trust and build rapport with your
prospects before selling. Ultimately, PLF is a long-term game plan. This is
about creating a sustainable business, not short-term gains.
Now to be clear, there are ways to infuse cash quickly, but that should not
be the sole purpose. The key is that with each launch your business will
continually get bigger, so you’re always building on your work and creating
this long-term success.
Key Question: “What’s the purpose of your action in the long-term?”
• 	This is a question you should be asking yourself every time you take an
action in your business
• 	What will your prospects, clients, and partners think about your actions?
• 	Extend your horizon and look beyond your current view - look further out
and think two or three moves ahead
• 	True experts think and take action this way. They always think ahead and
move proactively, not reactively
• 	In Module 1 we are going to dig deep into the core strategies and tactics
of PLF
• 	We’ll identify the core ingredients of your launch and put them in place
together throughout this module
• 	In the next video you will get the #1 cornerstone strategy that makes all
of PLF work…get ready!
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 2 of 3 --

Key Takeaway
Most people think they need a list, a product, or lots of experience first - but
this is false. You don’t need to be a guru with a big list to do a launch or be
successful online.
It’s all about getting started now and taking those baby steps.
!
